title: "Get semantic diff between two versions"
description: "Compare two versions of a definition and return the semantic diff."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get semantic diff between two versions"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/registry/definitions/{definition_id}/semantic-diff"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Compare two versions of a definition and return the semantic diff.

equivalence_status:
  equivalent — same meaning_hash; identical computation; safe to promote.
  compatible — meaning changed but backward-compatible.
  breaking   — downstream definitions may be invalidated.
  unknown    — treat as breaking.

HTTP 404 — definition or either version not found.

  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
